item.title: Download Knots 3D 10.9.2
item.description: Knots 3D is a mobile application that provides visual and interactive instructions for tying different types of knots. This app can be used to learn and practice different knots, with detailed animations and illustrations showing the correct technique for each knot. Used by arborists, fishermen, firefighters, climbers, military, and boy and girl scouts worldwide, Knots 3D will quickly teach you how to tie even the most difficult knots! item.title: Download Lj Video Downloader (m3u8,mp4) 1.1.75
item.description: Lj Video Downloader (m3u8,mp4) is a powerful tool to download videos from the web and save them as .mp4 files for local/offline playback. Features of Lj Video Downloader for Android Download video format m3u8/mp4/mpd/mov. Supports extracting video links directly from web pages (experimental). Multi-threaded download. Automatically convert to mp4 format. Supports multi-format playlists. Support m3u8/mpd audio/video split. Plugin to extract m3u8 links directly from website links.

item.title: Download Screen Off 26.04.22
item.description: Screen Off is a simple app for devices that allows you to turn off your device's screen with just one tap. It provides a convenient way to save battery and quickly lock your device without having to press the physical power button. Main features: Unlock with fingerprint reader Press and hold to open the Power Menu Quick settings box>>Re -Widget large size Free without hidden purchases.

item.title: Download SpeedChecker Speed Test 2.9.96
item.description: SpeedChecker Speed ​​Test is a mobile application that allows users to test the speed of their internet connection. To use the app, users simply download and install the app on their Android device, open the app, and then follow the on-screen instructions to run a speed test. The application will measure the download and upload speed of the user's internet connection and display the results in a clear and easy-to-read format. It can also provide additional information such as...

item.title: Download Lock Me Out - App/Site Blocker 7.3.2
item.description: Lock Me Out is a powerful app blocker that locks you out of selected apps when you want to do other things. There are three application blocking modes. The first mode blocks selected applications and allows the remaining applications. The second mode allows selected apps and blocks the rest. The third and strictest mode only allows the use of the lock screen. You can still answer calls or call emergency numbers in this mode. Usage-based locking: Usage-based locking has rules that...
